sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, mantissa, significand, unbiased exponent, and operand class bits.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, zero, invalid, overflow-style infinity, and testbench underflow-style zero cases.
sub_modules.fp_multiply_core: Computes result sign, adds unbiased exponents, and multiplies significands.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the significand product, applies rounding mode, packs the result, and detects overflow or flush-to-zero underflow.
